name: com.gamelovers.mcp-unity
author: CoderGamester
description: Fork of CoderGamester/mcp-unity based on upstream 1.3.0 commit 4c24251 (2026-05-01). Customizations: Codex plugin packaging, BackgroundWakeUpPump for unfocused/minimized Unity Editor processing, UI interaction tools (click_ui, scroll_ui, set_ui_input_text, invoke_component_method, capture_game_view, capture_diagnostics, screenshot, invoke_ui_event, set_input_field, find_gameobjects, enter_play_mode, exit_play_mode, ui_click_gameobject, wait_for_ui, get_interactable_at_position), run_tests failure diagnostics capture, play-mode transition deferral so tool responses flush before domain reload, and a WebSocket supervisor + reconnect hardening.
